name: progress-tracker
description: Hierarchical task and time tracker monorepo

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run start:api" "npm run start:web"
scripts.build:web: npm run build --workspace @progress-tracker/contracts && npm run build --workspace @progress-tracker/web
scripts.build:web:hosted: npm run build --workspace @progress-tracker/contracts && npm run build:hosted --workspace @progress-tracker/web
scripts.build:deploy: npm run build:web:hosted && npm run build --workspace @progress-tracker/api
